description.ko: 단일 에너지원이 복잡한 기하학적 스펙트럼으로 부서지는 빛의 물리학의 정교한 전시입니다.
description.en: An intricate display of light physics where a single source of energy is shattered into a complex geometric spectrum.

prompt: A macro cinematic shot of a PRISM-2 complex polyhedron structure titled 'The Rainbow Mandala.' A single beam of intense white light hits the glass, refracting into a brilliant web of #FF0080 magenta, #00FF80 emerald, #8000FF violet, and #FFFF00 yellow laser-like paths. Intricate caustic light patterns and sharp chromatic aberration dance across a minimalist matte black surface. 8k resolution, ray-traced lighting, ethereal atmosphere, sharp focus on internal light dispersion.
